metadata.description: Check one typed mathematical claim term: equivalence(fraction(A,B), fraction(C,D)), multiplication, difference, sum, subtraction, comparison, fraction_sum, fraction_of, iterate_to_whole, ordering, quadrilateral claims, or arithmetic_equation; leaves are integers or registered vocabulary atoms.

rows.text:
Dispatch operation: check_math_claim
Provider module: math_claim_checker
Role: unclassified
Inputs: claim
Parameters: claim (string, required)
Description: Check one typed mathematical claim term: equivalence(fraction(A,B), fraction(C,D)), multiplication, difference, sum, subtraction, comparison, fraction_sum, fraction_of, iterate_to_whole, ordering, quadrilateral claims, or arithmetic_equation; leaves are integers or registered vocabulary atoms.
Status: unrouted
Routes: none
Pages: none
